case_title: PALOMA BELARA VS. CATHERINE MCLEAN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-12-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CATHERINE MCLEAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-12-2010 AT 5:30PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELARA, PALOMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMINS, ROSS $1,927.91 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,977.91, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED ACCIDENT AND THAT DEFENDANT WAS LIKELY CAUSE DUE TO UNSAFE DRIVING. JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT ROSS COMMINS, NOT AGAINST DEFENDANT CATHERINE MCLEAN WHO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMINS, ROSS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY BELARA, PALOMA MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,927.91 FILED BY BELARA, PALOMA AS TO DEFENDANT MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,100.98 FILED BY MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BELARA, PALOMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS WAIVE INVALID SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JUN-05-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BELARA, PALOMA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS AS TO PLAINTIFF BELARA, PALOMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-12-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS WAIVE INVALID SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MCLEAN, CATHERINE COMMINS, ROSS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BELARA, PALOMA CROSS-CLAIM NOT SUBSTANIATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COMMINS, ROSS
